name: Logo Cloud
description: A horizontal trust bar that displays customer, partner, or media logos as either an infinite marquee or a static grid — the universal social-proof slot that fits between hero and feature sections.

descriptions.descriptive: A clean strip of brand marks rendered with subtle opacity and grayscale by default, lifting to full color on hover. The marquee variant scrolls at a slow constant velocity with edge-fade masks, while the grid variant sets logos in a calm 4-to-6 column matrix.
descriptions.usage: Place immediately after the hero or before pricing to absorb the 'who else trusts you' question without a testimonial commitment. The marquee variant scales gracefully past 8 logos; the grid variant is for curated selections of 4-8.
descriptions.audienceFit: Universal — B2B SaaS courting evaluators, agencies showcasing client portfolios, media-heavy editorial sites, and consumer brands citing press mentions all use this slot the same way.
